proposed_hypotheses.text: Immune checkpoint inhibitors produce shorter progression-free survival in EGFR-mutant patients than in EGFR-wildtype patients.

analyses.code:
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf
model = smf.ols('progression_free_months ~ treatment_io * egfr_mutation', data=df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment X, broadly ineffective overall, produces exceptional objective response in the subgroup with high biomarker Z.

analyses.result_summary: Among biomarker_z_high patients, response rate is 0.78 on treatment_x vs 0.22 off.
